title: coaching — PHP attribute contracts
description: One attribute. `#[AsCoachingListener]` on a service class marks it as a subscriber to coaching-lifecycle events — AttributeDiscovery picks it up and wires it to the event map declared in `events.json`.

attributes.name: AsCoachingListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to coaching module events (CoachingProfileCreated / CoachingProfileVerified / CoachingProfileDeactivated / CoachingProfileReactivated / CoachAssignmentCreated / CoachAssignmentUpdated / CoachAssignmentEnded / CoachAssignmentCancelled / CoachCertificationAdded / CoachCertificationVerified / CoachCertificationExpiringSoon / CoachCertificationExpired / CoachSkillRatingRecorded / CoachSkillRatingUpdated).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names. Empty = subscribe to every event in `Stackra\Sports\Coaching\Events\*`. Names resolve against events.json at boot.
